_comment: Rate card for the Proposal Generator. Fixed, pre-negotiated pricing. The generation logic composes three tiers (Baseline / Recommended / Premium) by selecting from these line items. Do not invent prices outside this card. Update values here without touching application code.

integrations.name: Salesforce Integration
integrations.description: Real-time sync of account data to enable automated escalation and priority routing.

integrations.name: Slack Integration
integrations.description: Connects platform notifications and workflows to Slack channels.

integrations.name: Jira Integration
integrations.description: Bi-directional webhook setup to automatically create and route engineering tickets.

professionalServices.name: Consulting Package

professionalServices.name: Enterprise Support
professionalServices.description: Dedicated ongoing support. Monthly fee with a one-year commitment.
